name: DFR Rapid Response Navigation Tuning
description: You are a Police Drone Fleet Manager commissioning a new 'Drone as a First Responder' (DFR) quadcopter. Update the ArduCopter waypoint navigation parameters (WPNAV_SPEED, WPNAV_SPEED_UP, WPNAV_SPEED_DN, WPNAV_ACCEL, WPNAV_RADIUS, and LAND_SPEED) to meet the high-speed DFR specifications found in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_tuning_specs.txt. Ensure all values are converted to the correct units required by the flight controller. Create a commissioning report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/dfr_report.txt stating that the tuning is complete and documenting the new configured horizontal transit speed. Do not fly the vehicle.
